description_long: This is a large, two-story detached house set on a spacious green lot, surrounded by a white fence and featuring a paved driveway that leads to a garage. The house has a complex, multi-gabled dark gray roof with several dormers and a prominent central chimney. The front facade includes a covered porch with columns, steps leading up to the main entrance, and a bay window that adds architectural interest. Multiple windows are symmetrically arranged across the exterior, with some featuring decorative trim. The property also includes a detached structure, likely a gazebo or small outbuilding, and a long driveway that connects to the main road. The overall design suggests a blend of Colonial and modern suburban architectural elements, with a focus on symmetry and curb appeal.
description: A large, two-story house with a multi-gabled dark roof, white exterior, symmetrical windows, a covered porch, and a spacious fenced yard with a driveway and detached outbuilding.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the house from the front, highlighting the main entrance, covered porch, central steps, and the driveway leading up to the garage.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the right side of the house, emphasizing the bay window, side yard, and the continuation of the driveway and fence.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the rear of the house, showing the back entrance, garage, and the full extent of the fenced yard.
description_view_3: View 3 captures the left side, revealing the side porch, additional windows, and the detached outbuilding near the driveway.
attribute_entryway_design: Central covered porch with columns, steps, and decorative trim
